why_it_matters: Tobacco status is a core element of a wellness/health-maintenance visit and affects cardiovascular risk assessment for her chest fluttering and preventive counseling.
A normal respiratory rate completes the vital-sign record and supports the reassuring cardiopulmonary assessment but is not independently actionable.
Height documents the basis for the BMI/obesity diagnosis and completes the objective data.
A low pain score is a routine vital-sign element and confirms no acute pain concern at this visit.
